scripts.release: git cliff --bump -o CHANGELOG.md && npm version $(git cliff --bumped-version) --no-git-tag-version && cd frontend && npm version $(cd .. && git cliff --bumped-version) --no-git-tag-version && cd .. && git add CHANGELOG.md package.json package-lock.json frontend/package.json && git commit -m "chore(release): $(git cliff --bumped-version)" && git tag $(git cliff --bumped-version)
